question:
Will Player D win the 2025 DP World India Championship?

Description: This market will resolve according to the player who wins the 2025 DP World India Championship, an official DP World Tour event scheduled to take place at the Delhi Golf Club, New Delhi, India, from October 16–19, 2025.

If a listed player withdraws, is disqualified, or otherwise becomes ineligible to win under the official tournament rules, that player’s market will resolve to “No.”

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by DP World Tour tournament rules (e.g., playoff results).

If no winner is officially announced by December 31, 2025, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The primary resolution sources will be the official results published by the DP World Tour on europeantour.com, and confirmation through PGA TOUR results or other credible media reporting may also be used.
event_title:
Will Player D win the 2025 DP World India Championship?

Description: This market will resolve according to the player who wins the 2025 DP World India Championship, an official DP World Tour event scheduled to take place at the Delhi Golf Club, New Delhi, India, from October 16–19, 2025.

If a listed player withdraws, is disqualified, or otherwise becomes ineligible to win under the official tournament rules, that player’s market will resolve to “No.”

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by DP World Tour tournament rules (e.g., playoff results).

If no winner is officially announced by December 31, 2025, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The primary resolution sources will be the official results published by the DP World Tour on europeantour.com, and confirmation through PGA TOUR results or other credible media reporting may also be used.

evidences.title: DP World India Championship 2025 preview picks analysis
evidences.content: ### The Course: Delhi Golf Club was established in the 1930s and was redesigned by Peter Thomson in 1977. It is heavily tree-lined. It is a par 72 measuring 6,912 yards and puts a premium on accuracy from the tee. ### Form Guide: Would you bet against Rory McIlroy adding yet another title to his glittering collection? He will be refreshed after a break following his efforts at the Ryder Cup and is not here to make up the numbers. ### Prize Money: Total prize money is $4m, with 5,000 Race to Dubai points awarded to the winner. ### How to Watch: Thursday, October 16, Sky Sports Golf, 7.30am; Friday, October 17, Sky Sports Golf, 7.30am; Saturday, October 18, Sky Sports Golf, 8am; Sunday, October 19, Sky Sports Golf, 7am. ### To Win: Rory McIlroy. Looking for fifth win of 2025 [...] "I’m also very much looking forward to playing at Delhi Golf Club again. I remember it as a tight, challenging, strategic golf course. I think it’s a great leveller, where players with all styles of play can contend, so it should help to make for a very exciting week. "DP World are such huge supporters of our sport - including the Tommy Fleetwood Academy, which I am so passionate about - and it’s fantast...

evidences.title: DP WORLD INDIA CHAMPIONSHIP - 4moles.com
evidences.content: Venue: DELHI Prize Money: USD 4 MILLION ## Description The DP World India Championship 2025, set for 16–19 October at Delhi Golf Club, is the biggest golf event ever staged in India with a record USD 4 million prize pool. As the eighth stop in the DP World Tour’s ‘Back 9’ Race to Dubai, it will see global stars Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Viktor Hovland, and Shane Lowry tee off alongside India’s own Yuvraj Sandhu and Udayan Mane. Co-sanctioned by the DP World Tour and PGTI, this 72-hole championship marks a landmark moment for Indian golf, leading up to the season-ending DP World Tour Championship in Dubai. ##### 01 Share; "Share") image ### Sheikh 9 months How to participate Are you sure you want to delete this comment? evidences.title: 2025 DP World India Championship betting tips and preview
evidences.content: Among those teeing up at Delhi Golf Club are European Ryder Cup stars Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Viktor Hovland and Shane Lowry, as is their captain Luke Donald. It’s not a new course for DP World Tour regulars, though. Delhi Golf Club has hosted the Indian Open no fewer than 30 times since that tournament’s founding in 1964 – though it hasn’t been back to the country’s capital since 2016. So who am I backing for glory in this brand new event? We’ll get there, but first… ### 2025 DP World India Championship key details Dates: October 16-19 Venue: Delhi Golf Club, Delhi, India (Par 72 – 6,912 yards) Format: 72-hole strokeplay with 36-hole cut Purse:$4 million Race2Dubai Ranking Points: 5,000 Defending champion: N/A (inaugural event) [...] 20/1 e/w (Paddy Power, Sky Bet 6 Places 1/5) Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Ben Griffin, and Viktor Hovland are all in this field and are all seen as more likely winners than Brian Harman, for good reason. The thing for me is that Harman is double the price of Hovland who is the outsider of that group, and he looks a reasonable course fit to me. On top of that, Harman’s iron play is trending in the right direction and should he couple a good...

evidences.title: DP World India Championship 2025 - BookMyShow
evidences.content: With a US$4 million prize fund and a pivotal place in the ‘Back 9’ swing of the Race to Dubai, the tournament is set to draw a world-class field, headlined by five-time Major winner and recently crowned Masters Champion Rory McIlroy, alongside Ryder Cup star Tommy Fleetwood, with both players making their debuts in India. Fans can expect four days of thrilling play in the heart of Delhi, with the stakes building toward the season-ending DP World Tour Play-Offs. Co-sanctioned with the Professional Golf Tour of India and backed by DP World’s global commitment to growing the game, the championship is poised to become India’s marquee international golf event, bringing together elite competition, vibrant local energy, and a powerful platform to inspire and expand the future of golf in India. evidences.title: DP World India Championship 2025: Our Expert Sleeper Tips | Golf Monthly
evidences.content: Anirban Lahiri hitting an iron shot towards the green at Delhi Golf Club, host venue of the 2025 DP World India Championship, with five inset images of players our experts believe have an outside chance to win - including Lahiri, Van Driel, Fitzpatrick, Schaper and Saddier The DP World Tour heads back to India for a second time in the 2025 schedule, but this time we head to Delhi Golf Club for the DP World India Championship. Our resident betting expert has already released his weekly betting column, Bazza's Best Bets, but who is going to capitalise on a late season win as we motor towards the conclusion in the Race To Dubai. [...] Anirban Lahiri (+3300 with BetMGM) Claiming the Hero Indian Open on this course back in 2015, as well as finishing runner-up in 2016, home hero Anirban Lahiri is certainly one to keep an eye on, especially at generous odds given his history with this layout. The only slight worry I have is the lack of competitive reps, with Lahiri not featuring since LIV Golf's Team Championship in August; However, returning to a venue he likes, and with the home fans behind him, I'm hoping he can carry on a good 2025 that includes a runner-up finish on the LIV Golf L...

evidences.title: Delhi (Lodhi) Review by Vince | Top 100 Golf Courses
evidences.content: Not 100% sure why, but if asked on the spot to think of a course to compare DGC with, I’d say Stoke Park in the U. K, although it felt far more surreal being in India, playing golf in the centre of Delhi. After a short stop, my caddie & I ventured onto the 9 hole Peacock course. Under a little time pressure from my travel companions, playing quickly & getting around the par 31, 2057 yard course in an hour was a real bonus. The six par 3’s, 2 par 4’s & sole par 5 are well designed & maintained to a similarly high standard to the main Lodhi course. Despite the short overall length it is a proper course & I’d happily play again if in Delhi again. [...] The 12th tee, a tough par 3 is the furthest point from the clubhouse. Car & rickshaw horn noises here pretty much being the only time I remembered we were in the city. Until this point the sound of birds enjoying their morning as the temperature rose had been the soundtrack to our round. My favourite hole was the 16th, a sharp dogleg & a tough par 4. Jungle both sides, length & positioning need to be spot on for a chance to reach the green in regulation. Peacocks roam (if that’s what peacocks do…) on many of the 27 holes at DGC & a p...

evidences.title: About Us – The College Golf Course at Delhi
evidences.content: The back nine, which opened in June 1996, is routed through the rolling terrain of the surrounding mountains. It is a magnificent natural design developed with the input and support of national leaders in the golf industry. Special features include state-of-the-art grasses and irrigation, panoramic views, and tee options that make it challenging and fun for golfers of every ability. Our practice facilities are among the best in the region. We offer an all-grass driving range and a large practice green which also includes a full chipping area and sand trap. [...] The College Golf Course at Delhi is a training ground for students enrolled in SUNY Delhi’s nationally recognized Golf and Sports Turf Management, and Professional Golf Management programs. Students learn all facets of the golf industry and put those skills to work at the course as part of their academic training. Outstanding course conditions make us the area’s leading championship event site. Since 2010, we have hosted the New York State Public High School Girls Championship as well as the Section 4, Class D Championship. We are also the long-standing host of the Delaware County Men’s and Women’s Amateur Championships...
